headline: This Startup’s Psoriasis Drug Studies Have Lifted Its Stock
summary: Phase 1 studies showed that one shot of ORKA-001 lasted long enough to allow dosing twice-a-year—or even once-a-year.

headline: Why Amgen (AMGN) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
summary: Amgen (AMGN) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
